description: Source registry for BDR ranking research collection. Search adapters produce normalized candidates; manual/static sources are review targets and future watcher seeds.

sources.label: Naver Cafe public search
sources.notes: Public Naver Cafe search result candidates. Requires human review before ranking use.

sources.label: Naver Blog search
sources.notes: Blog result candidates for tournament reports, recaps, and team mentions.

urls.label: KBA main
urls.notes: Official KBA site; domestic competitions, 3x3, records, notices.

urls.label: KBA division system
urls.notes: Division/i-League integrated system; league, tournament, records, schedule menus.

sources.label: Daum Cafe / BDR community

urls.label: BDR dongarry cafe
urls.notes: Daum search exposed this as a core BDR/dongari basketball room candidate. Treat as primary manual/watch seed until board-level access rules are confirmed.

urls.label: BDR League cafe candidate
urls.notes: Daum search exposed this as a BDR league candidate. Verify whether it contains ranking-relevant results before enabling automated watching.

urls.label: Daum Cafe root
urls.notes: Fallback root for manual URL intake and exact board discovery.

sources.notes: Daum Cafe does not have the same simple open search API path as Naver. Use manual URL seeds first, then add a dedicated adapter only for confirmed public pages.

sources.label: Tavily web search
sources.notes: First general web-search adapter. Good for Daum Cafe, official sites, Instagram/YouTube discovery, and broad web candidates. Requires human review.

sources.label: Google programmable/custom search candidate
sources.notes: Keep as a comparison candidate, not the first implementation target. Google Programmable Search has product-transition risk and setup overhead.

sources.label: Brave Search API candidate
sources.notes: Keep as a comparison candidate. Official app pages blocked direct CLI inspection during setup, so verify current plans before implementation.

sources.label: Manual URL intake
sources.notes: Use this for pasted URLs from Daum Cafe, Instagram posts, YouTube videos, images, or association pages.
